translations.en: a slightly built gypsy lad.
translations.zh: 身材略顯瘦小的吉普賽少年。

translations.en: "Our dog did his best trick for you. You should show him some appreciation."
translations.zh: 「我們的狗為你表演了最拿手的把戲。你應該表示一些謝意。」

translations.en: "Good $T."
"I am called Blaine."
translations.zh: 「吾名布萊恩。」

translations.en: "I am a @juggler. But I would fain @join thee and go adventuring."
translations.zh: 「吾是一名@雜耍師。但吾心願@加入汝一同冒險。」

translations.en: "I don't have anything to sell just now. Check back with me next week."
translations.zh: 「我現在沒什麼可賣的。下週再來找我吧。」

translations.en: "Here's a little tune to lighten your step on the road ahead."
translations.zh: 「讓吾唱首小曲，為汝前路輕盈腳步。」

translations.en: "Said the youthful earl to the gypsy girl,
translations.zh: 「年輕伯爵對吉普賽少女說，

translations.en: As the moon was casting its silver shine:"
translations.zh: 在月光傾灑銀輝之時：」

translations.en: "Dear little lady, my gypsy lady,
translations.zh: 「親愛的姑娘，我的吉普賽姑娘，

translations.en: Let me kiss those sweet lips of thine."
translations.zh: 讓我親吻汝那甜蜜的朱唇。」

translations.en: "I can't help you with that."
translations.zh: 「這個我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "My advice will cost you a gold coin. What do you say?"
translations.zh: 「吾的建議需要一枚金幣。汝意下如何？」

translations.en: "As you wish."
translations.zh: 「隨汝便。」

translations.en: "Best check your purse."
translations.zh: 「最好先查查你的錢袋。」

translations.en: "Almost due east of Iolo's hut there lives a powerful enchanter."
translations.zh: 「幾乎正在伊歐羅小屋正東方，住著一位強大的魔法師。」

translations.en: "I charge five gold for juggling. Would you like to see some?"
translations.zh: 「觀看吾的雜耍需要五枚金幣。汝想看嗎？」

translations.en: "Perhaps some other time."
translations.zh: 「也許改日吧。」

translations.en: "Best check your purse."
translations.zh: 「最好先查查你的錢袋。」

translations.en: The gypsy juggler takes three wands out of his knapsack and sets their ends afire.
translations.zh: 這位吉普賽雜耍師從背包中取出三根魔杖，點燃杖端。

translations.en: Tossing them into the air, he begins juggling.
translations.zh: 他將它們拋向空中，開始雜耍。

translations.en: The pattern is elaborate, almost hypnotic as the tips of the wands describe great flaming arcs and spirals through the air.
translations.zh: 動作繁複精妙，幾乎令人著迷，杖尖在空中劃出宏大的火焰弧線與螺旋。

translations.en: At regular intervals he tosses one around behind his back.
translations.zh: 每隔一段時間，他將其中一根拋到背後繞行。

translations.en: Yet somehow it always finds its way back into the pattern with the other two, without missing a beat.
translations.zh: 然而那根杖總能不差分毫地回到其餘兩根的節奏中。

translations.en: At last he catches all three of the wands in one hand, waves them with a great flourish, and bows deeply before you.*
translations.zh: 最後他一手接住全部三根魔杖，大幅揮舞後，深深鞠躬。*

translations.en: As he extinguishes the wands, he says "I hope you enjoyed the show."
translations.zh: 他熄滅魔杖，說：「希望汝喜歡這場表演。」

translations.en: "I have joined you already!"
translations.zh: 「吾已加入汝的隊伍了！」

translations.en: "Do you want me to come with you?"
translations.zh: 「汝想要吾同行嗎？」

translations.en: "Okay. Let me know if you need my help later."
translations.zh: 「好的。若以後需要吾的幫助，告訴吾。」

translations.en: "Not while you're in that thing!"
translations.zh: 「在那玩意兒上就算了！」

translations.en: "You have enough travelling with you already."
translations.zh: 「汝的隊伍已夠多人同行了。」

translations.en: "If you ask one of them to @leave first, I'd be happy to join you."
translations.zh: 「若汝請其中一人先@離隊，吾很樂意加入。」

translations.en: "I look forward to the many adventures we will share."
translations.zh: 「吾期待著吾等一同分享的諸多冒險。」

translations.en: "I knew it! You don't really want to have a gypsy around."
translations.zh: 「吾就知道！汝其實不想帶著吉普賽人。」

translations.en: "You wish me to leave you now, right?"
translations.zh: 「汝希望吾現在離開，對嗎？」

translations.en: "Oh, pardon my mistake."
translations.zh: 「哦，請原諒吾的誤解。」

translations.en: "It's just that we gypsies often have trouble finding acceptance among the gorgios."
translations.zh: 「只是吾等吉普賽人常常難以獲得外人的接納。」

translations.en: "I'm very grateful that you've given me the chance to come along on your quest."
translations.zh: 「吾非常感激汝給了吾機會，讓吾參與此次試煉。」

translations.en: "Let's get our feet back on solid ground first, okay?"
translations.zh: 「先讓我們腳踩實地再說，好嗎？」

translations.en: "Fine. I'll be with my fellow gypsies if you change your mind."
translations.zh: 「好吧。若汝改變主意，吾在族人那裡。」

translations.en: "I suppose you'll be wanting to keep all this equipment."
translations.zh: 「吾想汝會想留下這些裝備吧。」

translations.en: He leaves everything he was carrying in a pile on the ground.
translations.zh: 他將隨身攜帶的所有物品堆放在地上。

translator_notes: 布萊恩是可加入隊伍的吉普賽雜耍少年，有火舞表演場景。用半文言（「吾/汝」）表現年輕人憧憬冒險的語氣。歌詞適度譯出。
